results.notes: Wired resolve_create_token (3x 1/1 white Rabbit creature tokens). Auto-pattern's TOKEN_SUBTYPES list does not include 'Rabbit' so explicit resolve preserves the subtype for tribal synergy.

results.engine_gap: owner-choice ordering (target's owner picks top or bottom of library)
results.notes: Same library top/bottom owner-choice gap as LCI's Unlucky Drop; needs interactive prompt + ordered ZONE_CHANGE.
Wired resolve_draw(2). Auto-pattern's draw regex only matches digit / a / an, not the spelled-out 'two', so explicit resolve is required.

results.engine_gap: X-spell + reveal top N + per-card-type may-exile + cast-without-paying-mana + put rest in hand
results.notes: Multi-step interactive resolution depending on revealed cards' types and X; cannot be expressed via composable helpers.

Wired resolve_chain(resolve_pump(2,0), grant lifelink, grant indestructible). Pump auto-pattern can't span 'and gains lifelink and indestructible' between '+2/+0' and 'until end of turn', and there is no built-in keyword-grant resolve helper.

results.engine_gap: X-spell access + look-at top 2X + may-put X to hand + rest to graveyard + lose X life
results.notes: Resolve callbacks can't read StackItem.x_value through (targets, state) signature; X spells are a general gap.
Wired resolve_chain(resolve_pump(1,3), grant reach, untap target). The 'and gains reach until end of turn. Untap it.' phrasing isn't matched by the pump regex and there's no untap-target composable.
Wired resolve_chain(resolve_pump(3,3), grant trample/hexproof/indestructible). Same as Scales of Shale: pump regex doesn't span the keyword list.

results.engine_gap: fight-style damage (target you control deals damage equal to twice its power to target you don't control) + dual targeting
results.notes: Damage-equal-to-power requires reading the source creature's current power at resolution; not modeled by resolve_damage(amount).
Resolve callbacks can't read StackItem.x_value through (targets, state) signature; X spells are a general gap.
